feed.title: Daily Digest
feed.subtitle: Quote, fact, life hack, fortune cookie, and headlines of the day

entry.title: South Africa rolls out game-changing HIV shot amid funding shortfalls
entry.content: A new twice-yearly HIV prevention injection could transform South Africa's fight against the epidemic — but U.S. aid cuts and limited doses threaten to slow its impact.

entry.title: Ruby Duncan, Who Stormed Caesars Palace to Protest Cuts in Public Aid, Dies at 93
entry.content: An organizer, Duncan was hailed as an advocate for Nevada’s poor and racially oppressed.

entry.title: Anthropic Warns AI May Soon Be Able to Improve Itself
entry.content: Anthropic Warns AI May Soon Be Able to Improve Itself

entry.title: Blue Jays-Marlins trade pitch sends $56M Cy Young winner to Toronto for World Series resurgence
entry.content: The Blue Jays are needing a player that is going to set the tone after they trade for them. It is most likely going to have to come from a pitcher with great career success.

entry.title: Maple Leafs head coach search gets new update from NHL insider
entry.content: Toronto is still waiting to make a move.

entry.title: Packers risk major mistake with $110.5 million Christian Watson contract decision
entry.content: Green Bay handed out a lot of money for Watson.

entry.title: OHSAA track & field state championship live results, updates, schedule in all 5 divisions in Ohio
entry.content: It's the first year of an expanded format in Ohio.

entry.title: Lions sign new WR after injury forces roster move
entry.content: Detroit was quick to add a new guy.

entry.title: Steelers sign former 1st-round pick in free agency
entry.content: Pittsburgh is adding some defensive depth.

entry.title: Bills' free agent signs with AFC rival
entry.content: Buffalo still has a bunch of players available.

entry.title: Braves predicted to trade Didier Fuentes, JR Ritchie for $32M Cy Young winner to dethrone Dodgers
entry.content: The Atlanta Braves are going to be going after starters at the deadline. There is some real buzz that Atlanta is going to be going all in for one of the best starters in the game.

entry.title: Xi to Leave China for First Time This Year. Destination: Pyongyang.
entry.content: The visit speaks to North Korea’s rising importance among the U.S.’s biggest adversaries.

entry.title: Technical Assessment: Bullish in the Intermediate-Term
entry.content: Technical Assessment: Bullish in the Intermediate-Term

entry.title: The World Cup vs. bugs, germs and heat: Here's the game plan
entry.content: Despite a diminished federal presence, public health departments are preparing for common ailments that could afflict fans who gather for the event — and are keeping an eye on the Ebola outbreak, too.

entry.title: 'Top Gun: Maverick' actor James Handy stabbed to death in L.A.; girlfriend's son is arrested
entry.content: 'Top Gun: Maverick' actor James Handy stabbed to death in L.A.; girlfriend's son is arrested

entry.title: My husband planned our 'just us' trip and it was perfect. Here's why it worked
entry.content: For a smooth, rewarding and drama-free couples trip, take as much stress out of the equation as you can — and get comfortable with the fact that a fight may arise (and that's OK).

entry.title: Prosecutors lose appeal in Arizona's fake elector case and vow to present it again to a grand jury
entry.content: One of three remaining criminal cases stemming from efforts by President Donald Trump’s supporters to overturn the 2020 election appears headed back to a grand jury in Arizona

entry.title: Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carney warns foreign AI platforms can be used against Canadians
entry.content: Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carney is warning that foreign artificial intelligence platforms could be used against Canadians

entry.title: US sanctions Cuban President Miguel Díaz-Canel in latest move to pressure island's leadership
entry.content: The United States has imposed sanctions on Cuban President Miguel Díaz-Canel, his wife and three other individuals

entry.title: Minnesotans whose loved ones were killed by police condemn state GOP for praying for Derek Chauvin
entry.content: Outraged Minnesota residents with loved ones who died at the hands of police are demanding accountability over the state's Republican Party holding a public prayer for the former police officer in prison for murdering George Floyd

entry.title: US journalist pleads guilty to acting as an illegal agent for China
entry.content: The Justice Department says an American journalist has pleaded guilty to acting as an illegal agent for the Chinese government

entry.title: Graham Platner to hold Maine rally with Rep. Ro Khanna as scandals shake up campaign
entry.content: Maine Senate hopeful Graham Platner is hosting his first major campaign event since media reports surfaced that he previously exchanged sexually explicit text messages with several women while he was married

entry.title: China may move toward U.S. path on AI as firms poach employees
entry.content: Tencent Chief AI Scientist Yao Shunyu, who joined the company from OpenAI, said Friday he aims to pursue artificial general intelligence.

entry.title: Mira Murati steps back into the spotlight, carefully
entry.content: In the current environment, remaining heads down has diminishing returns; at some point, you have to make some noise just to remind the market you exist.

entry.title: What time is the NBA Finals tonight? TV schedule, channel to watch Spurs vs. Knicks Game 2
entry.content: Here’s everything you need to know to watch Game 2 of the Spurs vs. Knicks series, including the start time, TV channel and live stream information.

entry.title: College baseball on TV today: Full schedule, times, channels, streams for Friday NCAA super regional games
entry.content: It's time to determine the eight teams that will head to Omaha for the 2026 College World Series. Here's when and where to watch all the super regional games today.

entry.title: Belmont Stakes race schedule 2026: Post times, TV channels to watch Saratoga horse racing weekend
entry.content: A full weekend of racing is on tap at Saratoga. Here's when and where to watch it all.

entry.title: Arsenal, Juventus eyeing soon-to-be ex-Bayern Munich star
entry.content: It appears that two of the bigger teams in Europe are keeping an eye on Leon Goretzka.

entry.title: Seth Jarvis' friends get most special moment yet in Hurricanes' OT stunner
entry.content: These guys are everywhere at this point.

entry.title: How ill-advised John Tortorella challenge, Seth Jarvis OT goal cost Vegas Game 2 of Stanley Cup Final
entry.content: The Golden Knights found themselves moments away from a 2-0 lead in the Stanley Cup Final. Then, disaster struck.

entry.title: Experience: I sat under an oak tree every day for a year
entry.content: After a period of burnout, I realised that nature knows what you need, and is always ready to offer it – you just have to be quiet enough to receive itIn 2022 I moved to Clevedon, near Bristol. As soon as I saw the oak tree behind my flat, I started sitting under it. It’s not in some beautiful, remote place – it’s on an urban hill surrounded by grassland – but as a solitary tree on the side of a hill, it drew my attention. I was burned out. For 10 years, I had run a nonprofit tackling plastic pollution. We had got the government to ban plastic cutlery and polystyrene takeaway packaging, and supermarkets to ban plastic cotton buds. They were major achievements, but it was hard work and I was exhausted. I was transitioning away from activism, and only working three days a week. Continue reading...

entry.title: Cubs' Pete Crow-Armstrong looked like anything but the best defensive outfielder in baseball on this play
entry.content: PCA had a really tough time figuring this one out.

entry.title: Lions OC Drew Petzing: Penei Sewell developing into NFL's 'best' left tackle
entry.content: Detroit's offense is turning to the three-time All-Pro RT to switch ends and protect QB Jared Goff's blindside after Taylor Decker's exit.

entry.title: Caitlin Clark, Stephanie White share hug during Fever's win vs. Dream as questions about relationship swirl
entry.content: There looks to be no bad blood between the Fever head coach and star guard.

entry.title: Caitlin Clark leaves fans speechless with ridiculous move during Fever win over Dream
entry.content: It was quite the play.

entry.title: Knicks' star avoids initial injury report following injury scare
entry.content: It appears that Jalen Brunson isn't set to appear on the Knicks' injury report.

entry.title: Broncos fans should prepare for team to make surprising QB decision for 2026 season
entry.content: The Denver Broncos could have some big questions to answer at the quarterback position before the start of the 2026 season.

entry.title: Fortune Cookie of the Day
entry.content:
Plan for many pleasures ahead.
Lucky Numbers: 36, 39, 82, 65, 22, 60

entry.title: Life Hack of the Day
entry.content: Put lemon juice on your avocado and guacamole to make it keep for longer.

entry.title: Useless Fact of the Day
entry.content: In every episode of Seinfeld there is a Superman somewhere.

entry.title: Quote of the Day — Nelson Mandela
entry.content: “One of the most difficult things is not to change society - but to change yourself.” — Nelson Mandela

entry.title: U.S. journalist pleads guilty to acting as an illegal agent for China
entry.content: An American journalist who has lived in China since 2010 and worked for several state media organizations there pleaded guilty in a U.S. court Thursday to acting as an illegal agent for the Chinese government, the Justice Department said.

entry.title: Girl, 5, traumatised after GP assistant wrongly prescribed vaginal pessary, report finds
entry.content: Mother, who thought daughter was being examined by GP, says girl began to bleed and scream in pain after device was insertedA five-year-old was left traumatised, bleeding and in severe pain after a physician associate wrongly prescribed her a vaginal pessary, according to a damning report by the health ombudsman.The parliamentary and health service ombudsman said there were “multiple failures” in the care of the girl, who saw a physician associate (PA) at a GP practice in the East Midlands after complaining of itching and vaginal discharge. Continue reading...

entry.title: Murder charge dropped for Arkansas sheriff nominee who killed daughter's alleged abuser
entry.content: A judge has dismissed a murder charge against an Arkansas sheriff nominee who was accused of killing his teenage daughter's alleged abuser in 2024.

entry.title: Ahead of its IPO, Anthropic’s Daniela Amodei shrugs off doubts about AI’s returns
entry.content: Anthropic has been growing at a breakneck pace. The company announced that annualized revenue crossed $47 billion in May, up dramatically from roughly $9 billion at the end of 2025. That trajectory faces a real test, though.

entry.title: Airbnb’s Brian Chesky plans to launch a new AI lab
entry.content: The Airbnb CEO said last year it hasn't struck an LLM partnership because existing products weren't quite ready.

entry.title: Twins pitcher alleges condition of baseballs caused injury in formal complaint to MLB
entry.content: Bailey Ober is the latest in a long line of pitching arm injuries. But he believes that this problem could have been avoided with better resources and care.

entry.title: Fever vs. Dream live score, updates, highlights from Caitlin Clark-Angel Reese rivalry game
entry.content: The Sporting News is tracking live scoring updates and highlights as Caitlin Clark and Angel Reese renew their rivalry for the first time in 2026. Follow for complete results from Fever vs. Dream.

entry.title: Novig Promo Code TSNEWS50: Claim $50 Bonus for MLB, Stanley Cup Predictions
entry.content: Learn how to sign up with the Novig promo code TSNEWS50 and get a $50 bonus for MLB and NHL trading markets.

entry.title: Angel Reese means business in all-black leather outfit for Fever-Dreams game
entry.content: The Indiana Fever and Atlanta Dream game takes place at 7 pm ET.

entry.title: Texas Tech vs. Texas softball live score, updates, highlights from Game 2 of 2026 Women's College World Series
entry.content: Can the Longhorns go back-to-back? The Sporting News is tracking live updates and highlights from Game 2 of the 2026 Women's College World Series finals, where Texas will be looking to close out Texas Tech.

entry.title: ESPN's Tony Parker AI controversy, explained: Why blowback to image has ESPN 'evaluating' use of AI
entry.content: ESPN used AI to generate an image of Tony Parker during Game 1 of the NBA Finals. The internet was not too pleased with that decision.

entry.title: Minnesotans whose loved ones were killed by police condemn state GOP for praying for Derek Chauvin
entry.content: Minnesota residents with loved ones who died at the hands of police spoke out Thursday about the state Republican Party holding a public prayer for Derek Chauvin, the former police officer in prison for murdering George Floyd.

entry.title: Josh Allen and Hailee Steinfeld 1st wedding anniversary details revealed
entry.content: Josh Allen and Hailee Steinfeld got married on May 31, 2025.

entry.title: Tommy Kahnle could force the Red Sox into a major bullpen shakeup after debut
entry.content: Kahnle gave the Red Sox a choice, and it seems they made the right one.

entry.title: Coastal AD not expecting Kevin Schnall to leave for South Carolina or anywhere else
entry.content: Kevin Schnall has been linked to South Carolina baseball's coaching vacancy, but Coastal Carolina AD Chance Miller doesn't seem concerned.

entry.title: Filtr is a new privacy tool that blocks ads in almost every iPhone and Mac app
entry.content: This popular ad blocker app for iPhones, iPads, and Macs can now block ads from loading inside apps, including web browsers, thanks to a new feature in the latest Apple software.

entry.title: California governor, LA mayoral races still unsettled as vote count continues
entry.content: Outcomes in key races for governor and LA mayor remain unsettled as mayoral hopefuls Spencer Pratt and Nithya Raman, as well as gubernatorial candidates Xavier Becerra, Steve Hilton and Tom Steyer await their electoral fates.

entry.title: 2028 4-star S Bryce Hayes-Roberts transferring to IMG Academy
entry.content: The nationally ranked Bradenton (Fla.) IMG Academy Ascenders national football team received another big name prospect from the 2028 class, according to Rivals National Recruiting Analyst Sam Spiegelman on Thursday afternoon. [ $19.99 gets you a FULL year of On3 | Rivals national coverage ] Class of 2028 four-star safety Bryce Hayes-Roberts told Spiegelman that he will […]

entry.title: California primary results for key races including governor, LA mayor
entry.content: The races for governor and Los Angeles mayor are among the most closely watched contests yet to be decided in California's primary elections.

entry.title: Sophia Lopez double delivers Bradley softball's first state title 🥎
entry.content: Hilliard Bradley scored twice in the seventh inning of the OHSAA Division I softball state final to defeat Lancaster 7-5 on June 4.

entry.title: Real Madrid Chief Perez Announces Three New Signings And $175m Offer
entry.content: Real Madrid President Florentino Perez has announced the first three new signings of what he expects to be his next reign ahead of winning the election on June 7.

entry.title: Travis Kelce almost whiffs on Steelers' up-and-comer
entry.content: Travis Kelce’s reaction to Nick Herbig started awkwardly before turning into respect for the Steelers’ newly paid defender.

entry.title: World Cup Predictions Game – Sign Up Deadline Monday!
entry.content: Hi guys,If you’d like to take part in the World Cup Predictions Game, please let me know by Monday night, 8th June 2026 (UK time).Once I have 48 players, I’ll do a draw that will essentially mirro...

entry.title: Jalen Brunson and the Knicks rally to win a Game 1 thriller over the Spurs
entry.content: SAN ANTONIO — Jalen Brunson was beaten and battered but not dismayed, and the New York Knicks star had enough energy to orchestrate a fine George Gervin impersonation with an Iceman-like final quarter in Game 1 of the NBA Finals. The Spurs icon surely appreciated Brunson’s zest for heroics but the city of San Antonio was stunned over an opening defeat as the red-hot Knicks controlled the final ...

entry.title: One time Georgia baseball commit Brodie Campbell is now committed to Georgia Tech to play football
entry.content: Georgia Tech made Brodie Campbell a priority from the beginning. Now the Yellow Jackets have their quarterback. The three-star signal-caller from Newnan (Ga.) announced his commitment to Brent Key and Georgia Tech after taking his official visit to Atlanta this past weekend, giving the Yellow Jackets a major in-state win at the position. Campbell chose […]

entry.title: Anthropic Calls for Global Slowdown in AI Development
entry.content: Plus, GOP senators’ fight over ‘anti-weaponization’ fund spills onto the floor, and scientists learn improv.

entry.title: Dow soars nearly 900 points as Wall Street bets on Iran peace deal
entry.content: Despite flare-ups in Middle East violence, investors remain optimistic that the U.S. and Iran will soon end the war.

entry.title: Trump announces $700 million investment in coal plants, California export terminal
entry.content: President Trump on Thursday announced plans for his administration to commit $700 million in funding for coal plants and a new export terminal. CBS News' Olivia Rinaldi has details on the announcement and Mike O'Boyle, senior director for policy and strategy at Energy Innovation, joins with analysis.

entry.title: Stocks making the biggest moves after hours: Lululemon Athletica, ServiceTitan, Argan and more
entry.content: See which stocks are posting big moves after the bell.

entry.title: Coast Guard seizes dinghy in Bahamas that Lynette Hooker allegedly "bounced off" of
entry.content: The eight-foot dinghy that Brian Hooker says he and his wife, Lynette Hooker,​ were aboard when she disappeared in early April was seized by U.S. Coast Guard investigators.

entry.title: Trump says Bill Pulte won't be director of national intelligence permanently
entry.content: Asked if Bill Pulte has the national security experience for the job, President Trump said he does because he's "smart."

entry.title: Latest on Senate "vote-a-rama" on ICE funding, move by Democrats to block "anti-weaponization" fund
entry.content: The Senate is in the middle of a vote-a-rama, where they can offer an unlimited number of amendments to a piece of legislation and require the chamber to cast vote after vote. CBS News congressional reporter Taurean Small has more.

entry.title: Canada Prime Minister Mark Carney announces questionable national AI strategy
entry.content: Canada's "AI for All" plan prioritizes strengthening data protections and increasing AI adoption.

entry.title: Police have yet to catch a thief who used a Waymo to steal yoga clothes
entry.content: Believe it or not, this is not the first robotaxi-assisted theft.

entry.title: Polymarket cuts ties with George Santos as regulators probe trades on rival prediction market
entry.content: The online prediction platform Polymarket is ending its paid relationship with George Santos as federal regulators investigate whether the former congressman illegally bet against his own attendance at President Trump's State of the Union.

entry.title: Netflix will release its FIFA World Cup: Launch Edition game on June 11
entry.content: Netflix and EA are both going to capitalize on the World Cup craze.

entry.title: Three GOP congressmen probe foreign efforts to block U.S. data center build-out
entry.content: A trio of Republicans requested evidence of foreign influence campaigns working to slow U.S. artificial intelligence progress and block the development of the infrastructure needed to power it.

entry.title: Meta's latest AI tool gives creators a 'brainstorming partner'
entry.content: Meta's Creator Assistant AI can analyze your past posts to help with future content plans.

entry.title: George Pickens is not at OTAs, Cowboys expect him to be at mandatory minicamp
entry.content: Cowboys wide receiver George Pickens didn't attend the early phases of the team's offseason workouts and he didn't change course for the team's first week of OTAs.

entry.title: OL target set to make decision on Friday, FSU among five finalist
entry.content: 2027 three-star offensive lineman Shavezz Dixon will make his decision on Friday. Florida State is one of the five schools he'll choose from.

entry.title: Owen Hargreaves reckons Arsenal are the reason Thomas Tuchel has picked one England player this summer
entry.content: Thomas Tuchel’s World Cup squad raised a few eyebrows when it was announced a few weeks ago. England head into this tournament without arguably three of their most talented players as the likes of Cole Palmer, Phil Foden and Trent Alexander-Arnold are all being left at home.

entry.title: Key players across the globe who will miss FIFA World Cup 2026 due to injury
entry.content: Missing out on the World Cup is a soccer player’s worst nightmare. The tournament only rolls around every four years and is seen as the pinnacle of the sport, with legends forged within its confines.

entry.title: White Sox are 'perfect fit' for Angels' 4.63 ERA starter at trade deadline
entry.content: This would be a nice trade for the White Sox.

entry.title: Reassurance for bladder cancer patients | Letters
entry.content: Gail Cartmail offers a positive outlook to those facing life-changing bladder surgery, based on her own experienceThe report of treatment being trialled that could potentially spare bladder cancer patients life-changing surgery is welcome news (Doctors hail drug that spares bladder cancer patients ‘life-changing’ surgery, 2 June). Yet readers currently facing surgery that includes removing their bladder are likely to be concerned about the here and now.Like Tracey Emin, I was diagnosed with bladder cancer in 2020. Life requires some planning. For example, the paucity of public toilets means mapping alternatives, as bladder bags have much less capacity than a natural bladder. I always carry a spare kit, however; following the advice and guidance of stoma nurse specialists, it is possible to avoid leaks. The Urostomy Association is a mine of useful information. Continue reading...

entry.title: Dodgers at Diamondbacks updates. Brandon Pfaadt sent to minors
entry.content: The Arizona Diamondbacks will look to salvage a split of their four-game series with the Los Angeles Dodgers on Thursday night, June 4.

entry.title: Russian teen Mirra Andreeva coasts into French Open final
entry.content: Mirra Andreeva advanced to her first Grand Slam final with a 6-1, 6-3 victory over Marta Kostyuk in the French Open semifinals.

entry.title: Ticket prices are destroying the World Cup, NBA Finals, and Stanley Cup on resale market
entry.content: Sports are being torn apart by scavengers.

entry.title: John Bolton plans to plead guilty in classified documents case, sources say
entry.content: A federal grand jury indicted John Bolton, former national security adviser to President Trump, on 18 counts last year.

entry.title: Breaking down Todd Blanche's law career as Trump prepares to nominate him for attorney general post
entry.content: Todd Blanche, President Trump's former personal attorney and the current acting attorney general, is expected to be nominated to lead the Justice Department permanently, sources say. CBS News' Natalie Brand reports.

entry.title: Parents stay in Japan after son Weston Higginbotham goes missing during family trip
entry.content: Weston Higginbotham's family is desperately looking for him in Japan after he went missing during a family trip. CBS News' Anna Coren reports.

entry.title: Alleged $30M fraud ring involving children's health services busted, officials say
entry.content: Federal authorities have busted what they say is a $30 million fraud conspiracy involving billing for children's behavioral health services that were never provided, officials announced.

entry.title: Trump plans to attend NBA Finals in New York City, sources say
entry.content: Trump, a native New Yorker and self-described Knicks fan, said he was invited to attend a Knicks playoff game by the team's owner James Dolan, who has donated to Mr. Trump's political campaigns.

entry.title: Belkin made a charging grip for the Switch 2
entry.content: Belkin's new Switch 2 charging grip lets you game longer and be more comfortable doing it.

entry.title: Marshall Milton ANC review: Making the rare case for premium on-ear headphones
entry.content: Marshall's latest headphones are like its Major and Monitor models had a baby.

entry.title: H.R. McMaster says he's not seeing signs that Iran is moving toward Trump's demands
entry.content: CBS News contributor H.R. McMaster is reacting to Iran's Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei's latest message on the U.S. war. This comes as President Trump insists negotiations are progressing, but McMaster says some of his demands are not being met yet by Tehran.

entry.title: Here's what your employer can (and can't) do when your wages are garnished
entry.content: If your wages are garnished, your employer plays a role — but how involved can they actually be in the process?

entry.title: Ruto says US plan to build Ebola facility in Kenya is the 'right thing'
entry.content: Ruto says US plan to build Ebola facility in Kenya is the 'right thing'
